title: Youtubers
description: Adds your favourite youtubers to Minecraft!
body:
# In the youtubers mod youtubers are added to minecraft!
# 

**NEW UPDATE - 1.2**

But how does it work? (Feature List)

- First you need to summon YouTube's CEO or officialy named **The Boss**, You can create him by this recipe:
![The Boss Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7acca38cac7db58b64bacfdca65c616f1d55da.png)
- He is a hard boss and he drops **The Totem Of Youtube** which is the tool needed to summon youtubers.
- Currently, there is only 3 youtubers: (More soon)
  
###    1.   Mr Beast
- To make Jimmy you need some 100 Dollar bills, that are crafted like that:
  ![Money Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddec036bb958aef7ab47d8fabd86b72f527f2914.png)
  ![Money Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/277248bcbc47afe781d82c851db1897107b1e36b.png)
- With the dollar and the totem of youtube you can craft his spawn egg like that:
  ![MB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e53469b1fe294c2e28601a11db1e560fe078386b.png)
- After you kill him he drops a **Money Sword** which is a realy powerfull sword! It deals **10** damage / **5** hearts but it has the low durabillity of 500
###   2. Mark Rober
- To make mark you need the totem, lava bucket, beacon and daimonds
  ![mr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adfe3c2774afaa180101b17f77cd6903c3866c78.png)
- After you defeat him he drops a science saber which is actually a pickaxe not a saber it has realy high durabillity and its stronger then netherite!
###   3. Ryan Trahan
- To make Ryan you need some pennies that are crafted like this:
  
  ![Penny Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f06625be37b6c94ea505a7ae366a31603fcab194.png)
  ![Penny Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8dda22248486b37498cf1e484c14a278868c7c2.png)
- With some pennies, diamonds and the tottem you can craft Ryan's spawn egg
  ![Ryan Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36eeef768cd022e64d9dae0c6829f4b5588636ca.png)
- If you deafet him you get a Joyridicator which you can dupe like that:
 
  ![Joyride Dupe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4772173b0768c1df4b49e2671066d8a8b5cb8d95.png)
- With the Joyridicator and a Smithing Table you can make 3 candies:

  ![Cherry Berry Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cedff5433fcf0ca2b42652580bcc45ac72b6c93.png)
  ![Blue Raspberry Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880c549ae5d3623b327eb59991124ca1c8fa267b.png)
  ![Watermelon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75cbe04acdf29786f8f0121c5a86c232e1a8ff43.png)
### 4. Cosmeticboot
- im actually a mod at his discord server!
- To get him use this crafting recipe:
  
  ![Cosmeticboot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dcaa418b0e426bee23fdd6866ac8f24b17f23a0.png)
- After a hard fight he will drop his **Cosmetic Boots** which grants you speed and jump boost!



###   Bonus- Dude Perfect
- You can't make the youtuber's but you can make a dude perfect basketball! (which does nothing)
  ![Basketball Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b19a88d440aed9be20695b9170884b22d67f8b6a.png)
  
  **Thats about it! (for now)**

To help me check my other mod [Rick's Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/ricks-roll) its a amazing mod (surely not a rickroll)
